It is designed for installation on radiator valves and allows precise temperature control in individual rooms. Thanks to its ergonomic design and large backlit display, it offers convenient control directly on the head. It is the ideal choice for new installations and upgrades to existing Evohome systems. The EVO-TRV head (HR93) is the successor to the HR92 and meets the latest EU safety requirements thanks to the R3 wireless protocol. It communicates bi-directionally and encrypted with the Evohome central control unit at 868 MHz. The Honeywell Home EvoHome EVO-TRV (HR93) thermostatic head offers features to increase comfort, save energy and protect your heating system. Backwards compatibility allows it to be used in older Evohome installations. This set includes 4 thermostatic heads.
